name: Sparkling Pineapple Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 Bottle (750 milliliters) sparkling white wine, chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute 1 Bottle (1 liter) ginger ale for the sparkling white wine.
2. Heat sugar, water and cinnamon to boiling; reduce heat.
3. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours or until chilled.
5. Remove cinnamon from syrup.
6. Just before serving, mix syrup with remaining ingredients in punch bowl.
